reviews.review_title: Good game, could benefit from content
reviews.review_description: Listen, i know the game is still in early access and it even is still good. The concept is simple, but even if the gameplay is fun it's repetitive. It should have things like difficulties, customization, more & bigger maps, sandbox and most importantly : multiplayer and mods. Multiplayer could be like 3 strong humans and a gorilla. Sandbox could be something like Blade & Sorcery. You can make waves of humans, spawn weapons and with mods even more of them. Still a good game.
So!!! It’s perfect for getting anger out. I only wish their were more maps, also make it so when you grab people they can’t punch you cus that I not realistic and is also just annoying
It's really good to release anger, especially for someone who gets angry a lot

i absolutely loved it and wanted to kill more and more humans but i suggest you add a play as a human mode and pvp or a boss mode where you fight a   person that's a professional at boxing and can take alot of hits
I suggested more maps tho other than that good game

reviews.review_title: this game is just not for me
reviews.review_description: i do not like this game because it needs more improving
I feel like it’s too short and there should be levels but pretty fun👍
It's very easy to kill 100 humans they are two shot. :)
It’s funny
You turn too slow, they have too much hp, barely move, 1 star do better
I couldnt beat 100 humans :(

This is a great game for a free title. It's fun and funny. I can't play without laughing. The grab mechanic is a little off and needs some refinement. Grabbing dudes and throwing them is a good art of my strategy and it just isn't as responsive as it should be. More maps would also be nice. Maybe a power up or two? But all in all for a free game this is really cool. Nothing flashy but it's for sure a good time.
Very fun
When i kill 99 people the last one never spons

developer_response.body: Well major congratulations on getting that far! Thank you also for the bug report, we will look into that and get it updated

reviews.review_description: This game is very fun and stres reliving and i love t Gore
This is something mankind has questioned for years and this game tells us everything
Is fun to throw people around and smack them,and I think it would be cool to have more maps and more difficult levels. It's overall a pretty fun game! 5 stars!
It Would be better if you were able to throw people across the map and add more levels but overall its fun
Enjoyed all the memes around 100 men vs Gorilla so I decided to try this game when I saw it, it's pretty fun just smacking people about! Feels very satisfying to send them flying away with a punch
Fun but the humans have a lot of hp and I would want it to be if you punch them lightly they lose not much hp but if you punch them super hard they die,but it’s more fun than I thought
I absolutely love this game me and my friend play it all the time I know its one gorilla vs the men but pleeeeease add multiplayer.
Like bro slapping a bunch of people around is very fun so i do say to play it NOW!!
super comfy to beat up people as a stress relief actually
The humans are going at the end of the map and not even attacking but the game is fun when they aren’t doing that

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thank you for playing! We have an update to fix that issue coming soon, just waiting for the store to approve it - so give it another go in a day or two and hopefully it will be much better <3

reviews.review_description: You should add things you can pick up and throw at the humans like a rock cause that would be cool
It is so fun please keep going and don't forget about the og's
